sourceLabel: U.S. Department of State Visa Bulletin (July 2026)
notes: fad = Final Action Dates (when a green card can actually be approved). dff = Dates for Filing (when an I-485 can be submitted, in months USCIS accepts the DFF chart). 'C' = Current (no backlog). 'U' = Unavailable (no visa numbers available this month). The eb5 entry is the EB-5 Unreserved category; eb5SetAsides holds the three reserved set-aside categories (Rural, High Unemployment, Infrastructure). All values verified against the official July 2026 bulletin. USCIS has directed applicants to use Final Action Dates for employment-based adjustment of status filings in July 2026.
